## Agent Constraints

- Work only on this issue.
- Do not expand scope.
- Do not introduce dependencies unless explicitly allowed below.
- Do not touch secrets, auth, billing, production deploy config, permissions, or infrastructure unless explicitly allowed below.
- Open a PR and request human review.
- Do not merge.
- Do not enable auto-merge.
- Do not bypass branch protection or repository rulesets.

## Agent Ready Checklist

- [ ] Scope is clear
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable
- [ ] Risky areas are excluded or explicitly allowed
- [ ] Verification expectations are clear
- [ ] Human review path is clear
- [ ] Apply `agent-ready` label only after this checklist is complete
